title: interval_registry.tsv row schema
description: One row per interval at any scale (genome, chromosome, SNP window, candidate region). Produced by registries/build_registries.py. TSV with these columns in this order.

interval_id.description: Stable id. Format: 'INT_GENOME' for the whole-genome row, 'INT_CHR_<chrom>' for chromosomes, 'INT_<6-digit-seq>' for windows, '<candidate_id>' (free-form) for candidates.

scale_type.description: Logical scale of this interval. 'window' = SNP window; 'region' = candidate inversion / annotated locus.

chrom.description: Chromosome name. 'genome' for the whole-genome row.

mode.description: How this interval is meant to be consumed by downstream engines.

n_markers.description: BEAGLE-marker count within this interval (precomputed for fast filtering).

note.description: Free-form annotation; for SNP windows, holds 'snps=<N>'; for candidates, the candidate_id.

consistency_rules.genome_row: scale_type='genome' rows MUST have chrom='genome' and interval_id='INT_GENOME'.
consistency_rules.chromosome_row: scale_type='chromosome' rows MUST have start=0 and interval_id='INT_CHR_<chrom>'.
